tests.name: Spec violation detected in Stage 1
tests.notes: Two-stage sequencing is the core preference. Models comply with the stop-at-Stage-1 rule ~80% of the time. Without the skill, models almost always blend spec and quality in one pass.

tests.name: Security finding in Stage 2
tests.notes: Shell injection is caught reliably. Main failure: downgrading severity to 'warning' for internal tools — the skill's NEVER rule addresses this explicitly.

tests.name: Missing UI states — warning-level finding
tests.notes: Models frequently mark missing empty/error states as suggestions rather than warnings. The skill's severity taxonomy (critical/warning/suggestion) needs reinforcement.
